case_title: CITY & CO OF SF VS. BRIAN C GEORGE
cause_of_action: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT REGARDING PARENTAL OBLIGATIONS

docket_entries.description: MOTION FILED - SUPPORT/HEALTH CARE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR MOTION: JUDGMENT ON JAN-08-2002 - ORDER PER MOVING PAPERS GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA= TROW; BY STIPULATION; FATHER'S WAIVES HIS RIGHTS REGARDING PATERNITY; COURT MAKES A FINDING OF PARENTAGE FOR THE CHILD DOB 9/29/01; COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER PAY BELOW GUIDELINE CHILD SUPPORT $350.00 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 1/1/02; MOTHER WAIVES HER RIGHT TO CHILD SUPPORT FOR THE MONTHS OF 9/2001, 10/2001,11/2001 AND 12/2001;GUIDELINE =$529.00; BOTH PARTIES AGREE THAT THE BELOW GUIDELINE AMOUNT IS AN ADEQUATE TO MAINTAIN THE CHILD; EITHER PARTY MAY RETURN TO COURT WITHOUT A CHANGE OF CIRCUMSTANCES; BOTH PARTIES SHALL EQUALLY PAY 50/50 OF ALL UNINSURED MEDICAL EXPENSES OF MINOR IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE NOTICE OF RIGHTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES; FATHER TO NOTIFY DCSS WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ANY CHANGE OF EMPLOYMENT/RESIDENCE/INCOME OR HEALTH INSURANCE. (WIGHTMAN) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LEWIS GILLIAN CSR #12355; CLERK: LESLEY M. SADHU
